title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Sika India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Sika India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Sika India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sika India Asia Pacific Associates:
Sika India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India Asia Pacific Associates!
